title: Regency Centers Invites You to Join Its Second Quarter 2023 Earnings Conference Call
text: JACKSONVILLE, Fla., June 30, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Regency Centers Corporation (The “Company”) (NASDAQ: REG) will announce its Second Quarter 2023 earnings results on Thursday, August 3, 2023, after the market closes. The Company's earnings release and supplemental information package will be posted on the Investor Relations section of the Company's website – investors.regencycenters.com. The Company will host an earnings conference call on Friday, August 4, 2023, at 11:00 a.m. ET.

title: Should You Retain Regency (REG) Stock in Your Portfolio Now?
text: Regency's (REG) focus on grocery-anchored shopping centers, expansion efforts and a solid balance sheet augur well for growth. Higher e-commerce adoption and high interest rates are headwinds.

title: Preparing And Profiting From Another Real Estate Meltdown
text: My grandmother often told me about her life as a child and the adversity that her parents faced growing up on a small family farm in rural South Carolina. My great grandparents witnessed the crippling of the banking system as panicky depositors withdrew cash, and of course, unemployment soared. I can only imagine what life would have been like during the Great Depression, a period in which real estate values were in a tailspin.
